creator: toxic@doobie.com
text:
Created attachment 157151
Patch to apply to news/nzbget

Update to 15.0, released upstream on May 19.

Upstream announcement here:  http://nzbget.net/forum/viewtopic.php?f=4&t=1976

Port changes:
7zip option is now turned on by default
sbin/nzbgetd removed from pkg-plist (deprecated upstream)
files/nzbget.in changed to reflect deprecated nzbgetd
